verses.text: Zebulun minamte leh Naftali minamte' ten'na gamte in mindaina thuak ngei uh a, ahi zongin mailamah pahtawina ngahkik ding uh hi. Mediterranean tuipi-a kipanin nisuahna lam Jordan gun gal, minam dangte' ten'na Galilee gamsung minthang kik ding hi
Khuamial sunga a pai mite in khuavak lianpi mu khinta a, khuamial thukna gamsungah a teng mite tungah khuavak taang khinzo hi
Nangmah in amaute na pungsak a, a lungdamna uh na khangsak hi. Anlak hun ciangin lungdamna leh mite in vankisutte a hawm ciangun a lungdam bangun nangma mai-ah amaute lungdam uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Midian-te a kizawh ni-a bangin nangmah in amau' vangik puakna hakkol leh amaute a kisatna ciangkhut na kuaihtansak a, nangma mi a bawlsia minamte na zogawp hi
Galkap hangte' khedap khempeuh leh si a baang puan khempeuh mei-in kicih ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh eite-a' dingin naungek khat hong suak a, eite' tungah tapa khat hong kipia hi. Amah pen eite hong ukpa hi ding a, ama min pen “Lamdang Thulakpa, Vanglian Pasian, Tawntung Pa, Nopsakna Kumpi,” kici ding hi

Tuhuna kipanin a tawntungin David kumpi tokhom tung leh ama gamsungah thutang leh thuman phutin, a lian semsem ama ukna leh nopsakna in mong neilo ding hi. Vanglian Topa' deih luatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi.
Topa in Jakob tungah thu khat khah a, Israel tungah thu hong tung ding hi

“Leiseekte kicim khin hi; ahih hangin suangseek tawh i lam ding hi. Theithek singte kisia khin hi; ahih hangin taamtak sing tawh i khek ding hi,” ci-a kiphasakin lungsim kihisak Efraim mite leh Samaria gamsunga teng mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amaute do-in a langpang ding bawl a, amau' galte a hanthawn hi
Ama mai-a om Syria mite leh a nunga om Filistia mite in kam ka-in Israel netum uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nailo a, ama khut kizanlai hi
Amaute a satpa' lamah Israel mite kiheilo a, Vanglian Topa zonglo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel sung panin a makaite leh a mihonte, a lu panin a mei dongin ni khat thu-in a vatmai hi
Upapa leh a zahtakhuai mipa pen a lutang hi a, zuauthu a hilh kamsangpa pen a mei ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh hih minam a makaihte in lam khialsak a, amau' makaih mite in siatna ngah uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin amau' tangvalte tungah Topa lungdamlo a, pa neilote leh a meigong numeite uh tungah hehpihna neilo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh pen Pasian' thu a khual omloin siatna a bawl vive hi a, kam khempeuh in haina thu a gen uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nailo a, ama khut kizanlai hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh gitlohna mei bangin kuang a, lingkungte leh lingte kangtum sak hi. Gamlak lopa phate kuangsak a, meikhu lomtangin van lamah kizialto uh hi
Vanglian Topa' hehna hangin meikuang bangin gamsung kang a, mite pen mei-a kicih sing tawh kibang uh hi. Kuamah in a sanggampa nangawn zah tuanlo hi
Amaute in a taklama omte ne uh a, ahih hangin a gil uh kiallai veve hi. A veilama omte ne uh a, ahih hangin kham nailo uh hi. Mite in amau' vengte' sa ne ciat uh hi
Manasseh in Efraim, Efraim in Manasseh ne-in, tuate gel in Judah langpang khawm uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nailo a, ama khut kizanlai hi.
